zh.lifeSummary: 當Ednywain I Bendew ap Neiniad of Tegeingl於1020年出生在威爾士福林爾利斯 Y 可德時，他的父親Neiniad ap Gwaethfoed31歲，母親Eva ferch Gwrgan19歲。他和Gwerfyl ferch Lluddocca至少有4個兒子和2個女兒。他去世於1079年在威爾士福林爾享年59歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ednywain I Bendew ap Neiniad of Tegeingl于1020年出生在威尔士福林爾利斯 Y 可德时，他的父亲Neiniad ap Gwaethfoed31岁，母亲Eva ferch Gwrgan19岁。他和Gwerfyl ferch Lluddocca至少有4个儿子和2个女儿。他去世于1079年在威尔士福林爾享年59岁。

nameMeanings.name: ap
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Dutch: occupational name for a cobbler.
Slovenian: nickname for a talkative person, from lapati ‘to babble’, or a topographic name from dialect lap ‘abyss’. Compare Lapp 4.

variants.name: Lapp
meanings: German, English, and Dutch: from Middle High German and Middle English lappe, Middle Dutch lap ‘cloth, patch, rag’, a metonymic occupational name for a mender of clothes or shoes, or a nickname given to someone who wore ragged clothes or garments with loose folds, flaps, or hanging sleeves, or who had fleshy folds of skin on his face, neck, or body.

German: nickname for a simple-minded person, from Middle Low German lappe ‘fool’. This surname (in any of the two possible senses; see also 1 above) is also found in France (mainly Alsace, also Lorraine).
English: nickname from Anglo-Norman French lappe ‘burdock’, perhaps for someone with a prickly character.

nameMeanings.name: Bendew
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: occupational name for a cooper, a short form of   Fassbender  . Compare   Bainter   and   Painter  .
English (London): metonymic occupational name for an archer or bow maker, from Middle English bender, an agent derivative of benden ‘to bend’ (Old English bendan). Compare Benbow .
Hungarian: from bender ‘curl’, hence a nickname for someone with curly hair.

variants.name: Bainter
meanings: Americanized form of German   Bender  . Compare   Painter  .

variants.name: Benner
meanings: Irish: Benn, a mountain, and "er," a contraction for fear, a man, meaning a mountaineer

variants.name: Fassbender
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Franz, Helmut, Achim, Friedrich, Guenther, Hans, Kurt, Monika.

German: occupational name for a cooper (standard German Fassbinder), from Middle High German faz ‘cask, barrel’ + binder ‘joiner’. This is a term used in northern Germany. The surname Fassbender is also found in the Netherlands. Compare Fasbender , Fasbinder , and Vasbinder .

variants.name: Bander
meanings: Short form of   Alexander  , now popular as an independent given name, especially in Norway.

en.lifeSummary: When Ednywain I Bendew ap Neiniad of Tegeingl was born in 1020, in Llys Y Coed, Flintshire, Wales, his father, Neiniad ap Gwaethfoed, was 31 and his mother, Eva ferch Gwrgan, was 19. He had at least 4 sons and 2 daughters with Gwerfyl ferch Lluddocca. He died in 1079, in Flintshire, Wales, at the age of 59.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ednywain I Bendew ap Neiniad of Tegeingl est né en 1020, à Llys Y Coed, Flintshire, Galles, son père, Neiniad ap Gwaethfoed, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Eva ferch Gwrgan, avait 19 ans. Il a eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles avec Gwerfyl ferch Lluddocca. Il est décédé en 1079, à Flintshire, Galles, à l’âge de 59 ans.

Er hatte mit Gwerfyl ferch Lluddocca mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1079 im Alter von 59 Jahren in Flintshire, Wales.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ednywain I Bendew ap Neiniad of Tegeingl родился в 1020 г. в местности ллиз и коед, флинцхир, Уэльс, его отцу по имени Neiniad ap Gwaethfoed было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Eva ferch Gwrgan, 19. У него было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери от Gwerfyl ferch Lluddocca. Он умер в 1079 г. в местности флинцхир, Уэльс в возрасте 59 лет.
